# SEO & Metadata Requirements Quality Checklist: Website Improvements

**Purpose**: Validate that SEO and metadata requirements (previews, canonical, locale, JSON-LD, on-site search) are complete, unambiguous, and verifiable. Tests the quality of what is specified, not implementation behavior.  
**Created**: 2026-02-28  
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are all page types that must have rich previews (title, description, image) explicitly listed (e.g. home, about, writing index, writing [slug], projects index)? [Completeness, Spec §FR-010, User Story 4]
- [ ] CHK002 Is the canonical URL form (e.g. with or without trailing slash) explicitly specified so FR-011 is implementable? [Completeness, Spec §FR-011]
- [ ] CHK003 Is the locale or language value (e.g. en_US) for metadata specified in the spec or left to implementation? [Completeness, Spec §FR-011]
- [ ] CHK004 Are required Article JSON-LD properties (headline, author, datePublished, description, url, image) explicitly listed and aligned with the spec? [Completeness, Spec §FR-010, contracts/page-metadata]
- [ ] CHK005 Are required Person JSON-LD properties for the About page explicitly listed (name, url, jobTitle?, sameAs, image)? [Completeness, Spec §FR-010, contracts/page-metadata]
- [ ] CHK006 Is the source of the default preview image (URL or path) required to come from a single source per FR-020? [Completeness, Spec §FR-010, FR-020]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK007 Is "correct title, description, and image" for previews defined (e.g. page-specific vs default) for each page type so validators can verify? [Clarity, Spec §FR-010]
- [ ] CHK008 Is "article-specific preview image when provided" defined (e.g. optional frontmatter field, fallback to default) so writers know how to supply it? [Clarity, Spec §FR-010, User Story 4 Acceptance 4]
- [ ] CHK009 Is "consistent canonical URL form and locale across page types" defined so consistency can be objectively checked? [Clarity, Spec §FR-011]
- [ ] CHK010 Is "relevant results" for on-site search defined (e.g. match on title/theme/tags, ordering) so FR-012 is testable? [Clarity, Spec §FR-012]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK011 Are preview requirements (FR-010) consistent with the Edge Case "image optimization not available" (images still served, default used when needed)? [Consistency, Spec §FR-010, Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK012 Do metadata default requirements (FR-020) align with FR-010 and FR-011 so one source supplies default image, site name, and locale? [Consistency, Spec §FR-010, FR-011, FR-020]
- [ ] CHK013 Are the page types in the spec (home, about, writing index, writing [slug], projects index) consistent with "critical routes" in automation (FR-019)? [Consistency, Spec §FR-019, Assumptions]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK014 Can SC-004 ("shared links to About and at least one writing show correct title, description, and image in a standard preview validator") be verified without implementation details? [Measurability, Spec §SC-004]
- [ ] CHK015 Can SC-005 ("visitor can find a specific piece of writing using on-site search by title or theme in under three actions") be objectively tested (e.g. defined actions and success criterion)? [Measurability, Spec §SC-005]
- [ ] CHK016 Is "consistent across page types" for canonical and locale testable (e.g. by listing page types and checking each)? [Measurability, Spec §FR-011]

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] CHK017 Are requirements specified for pages that have no article-specific image (default image must be used)? [Coverage, Spec §FR-010]
- [ ] CHK018 Are requirements defined for the writing index and projects index preview metadata (title, description, image) so they are not ambiguous? [Coverage, Spec §FR-010]
- [ ] CHK019 Is the zero-results case for on-site search (clear message, optional suggestions) required in a functional requirement or only in Edge Cases? [Coverage, Spec §FR-012, Edge Cases]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK020 When a writing has no publish or update date, are Article JSON-LD requirements (datePublished, dateModified) specified (e.g. optional, or use placeholder)? [Edge Case, Gap]
- [ ] CHK021 Is behavior specified when the default or article-specific image URL is invalid or unreachable (e.g. validator failure, fallback)? [Edge Case, Gap]

## Validation & Automation

- [ ] CHK022 Are automated metadata/JSON-LD checks (FR-019) required to validate the same page types and properties as the contract (page-metadata)? [Consistency, Spec §FR-019, contracts/page-metadata]
- [ ] CHK023 Is the acceptance method for "correct preview" (e.g. Twitter Card Validator, Facebook Debugger, or generic og checker) specified or left to implementation? [Clarity, Spec §User Story 4, SC-004]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- These items validate the quality of SEO and metadata requirements as written; they do not verify that tags are correctly implemented.
- Each `/speckit.checklist` run creates a new file; this file focuses on SEO and metadata only.
